                  simpa [hEq] using hymemref

                      have : y ≤ sSup (B N hN) := le_sSup hy
                      simpa [hB N hN] using this
                    have hnle' : N ≤ y := by
                      have : N ≤ sSup (B N hN) := by simpa [hB N hN]
                      have : N ≤ y := by
                        have := (sSup_le_iff).1 (show sSup (B N hN) ≤ y from by
                          intro z hz

                            have : z = N := by
                              have hzmemref : z ∈ refinement (D := D) B hB hB' hB'' := by

                              have hzmemD : z ∈ D := by simpa [hEq] using hzmemref
                              have : z = N := by
                                have hzle : z ≤ N := by
                                  have : z ≤ sSup (B N hN) := le_sSup hz
                                  simpa [hB N hN] using this
                                have hnle'' : N ≤ z := by
                                  have : N ≤ sSup (B N hN) := by simpa [hB N hN]
                                  exact le_trans this (le_sSup hz)

                              exact this
                            exact this.symm))

                      exact this
                    exact le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hyle, hnle'⟩

              exact le_trans this (le_sSup hx)
            exact this
          exact le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hxle, hnle⟩

    · intro x hx
      simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx
  exact hne hseteq
